categories.name: Algorithm Specification & Completeness
reference_questions: Provide complete pseudocode or flowchart for the claimed method including every decision branch.
What are the exact inputs and outputs with data types, value ranges, and units?
What is the worst-case time complexity O(?) and space complexity O(?) with derivation?
What alternative embodiments exist — can any step be omitted or reordered?
What are the edge cases and how does the algorithm behave in each?

categories.name: Implementation Reproducibility
reference_questions: What programming language, compiler, and library dependencies are required?
What hardware platform and OS were used for benchmark results?
What floating-point precision and rounding mode are required?
What is the performance improvement vs prior art? Provide benchmark methodology.
